Read the newest DeepAgent-authored artifact in `.acp/artifacts/`, `.acp/tasks/`, or `.acp/messages/` that is addressed to `copilot` or `all`.

Before taking action:

1. Summarize the artifact in one short paragraph.
2. Verify its claims against the current workspace files.
3. Call out any stale or conflicting assumptions.

Then continue the task using the artifact as context. If the artifact is missing or stale, stop and say exactly what needs to be regenerated.
